calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, sheila Tsang, appears in Pro Per; Respondents, Sheridan and Joshua Langland, appear in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kane
EXHR(A) Binder of small claims related papers
9:45am
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence was retained.
NOTE: Loose unmarked exhibits were placed in an Appellant's envelope, but they may include Respondent exhibits as well. (The Judge Pro Tem placed a large amount of loose exhibits in the file without asking the clerk to mark them.)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-06-2010 Judgment Entered
